description: Golden Stage -> Song usage stream for the same service as stage-to-rec-cues.json. One UsageEvent per service item, logged the first time the item is shown (the shown-items guard prevents double-logging when the operator advances within or scrubs back to an item). Each event conforms to the UsageEvent contract posted to SundaySong /v1/usage/log. idempotency_key follows the contract formula makeUsageIdempotencyKey(service_id, service_item_id) = svc-<service_id>:item-<service_item_id> and excludes the variant, so re-keying the same item mid-service collapses to one event; the API dedupes on it.
